bugs.desc: off-by-one: range(1, len(values)) skips the first element, so the docstring's 'sum of all values' is wrong
mutable default argument: store={} is created once and shared across all calls, leaking state between callers
off-by-one: slice end is exclusive, so 'start + size - 1' drops the last item of every page
secret compared with ==, which short-circuits and leaks timing info; use hmac.compare_digest for constant-time comparison
SQL injection: username is interpolated into the query via f-string; use a parameterized query instead
bare 'except:' swallows everything including KeyboardInterrupt and SystemExit; catch ValueError specifically
compares to None with '!=' instead of identity 'is not None'
